description_long: This is a small, single-engine airplane with a high-wing configuration and a fixed tricycle landing gear. The fuselage is primarily white with prominent red accents on the wings, tail, and nose, and blue highlights near the wingtips. The cockpit is forward-mounted and enclosed, featuring clear windows and a streamlined canopy. The tail section is conventional, with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers extending from either side. The propeller is mounted at the nose, and the landing gear consists of two main wheels and a nose wheel, all with visible fairings.
description: A small, high-wing, single-engine airplane with red and white coloring, fixed tricycle landing gear, and an enclosed forward cockpit.
description_view_0: Front view showing the propeller, nose wheel, and symmetrical high wings with red and white coloration.
description_view_1: Rear oblique view highlighting the tail section, single vertical stabilizer, and the right wing's underside.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the full wingspan, red wing surfaces, and the layout of the landing gear.
description_view_3: Rear oblique view from the opposite side, showing the tail, left wing, and the registration marking on the fuselage.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-wing, straight wings with slight dihedral and no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and one nose wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with side windows and a single canopy.
